desc: Consolidate the remaining partly-uncommitted t6040 DT state in ~/Code/linux onto damsleth/linux branch wallace/t6040-bringup (AsahiLinux asahi-wip base; yuka retained as a topic remote). The initial 15-commit Wallace stack is published and the standard DockChannel DT build is validated, but uncommitted board variants remain a loss risk because kbuild copies DT files from /src. Draft an upstream-shaped DT series (t6040.dtsi, t6040-pmgr.dtsi, j614s board files, Mac16,8 compatible) with dtbs_check/checkpatch validation. Compare yuka/enverbalalic's T6040/T6041 DT work, including measured DockChannel IRQ 816 and per-instance IRQ-bit properties. Any external coordination is draft-only here; CJ posts.
author: fable
